prompt: Generate a UI mockup of an online math quiz screen. Use Image 1 for the question section, Image 2 for answer choices, and Image 3 for the timer placement.
prompt_refined: Generate a UI mockup for an online math quiz screen. The main question display area, resembling Image 1, should be positioned centrally at the top. Below this, include multiple answer choices, each with a selectable element styled after the rounded square in Image 2. A circular countdown timer, like the one in Image 3, should be placed prominently in the top-right corner of the screen.
objects: online math quiz UI mockup screen
main question display area centrally at the top
selectable rounded square elements for answer choices
circular countdown timer in the top-right corner
